name: prose-judge falls back to not_enforced rather than a silent green when it cannot judge the prose
command:
mkdir -p docs/adr && printf '# 0098. Cluster networking

## Decision

Ingress is restricted to the office CIDR only.
' > docs/adr/0098.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/prose-judge.sh" --rule g-aws-no-unrestricted-ingress --root . --paths docs/adr/0098.md
